title: His Change.
content:
My many cares and much distress
    Has made me like a wilderness;
    Or, discompos'd, I'm like a rude
    And all confused multitude:
    Out of my comely manners worn,
    And, as in means, in mind all torn.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "His Change."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
